title: PlanOrchestratorCoverage
description: Output of verify-coverage.py — used by compile-plan.py and surfaced in the final plan's coverage table.

duplicates.description: Task IDs that received `### T<N>` headings from more than one agent — expected for cross-cutting tasks; deduplicated by compile-plan.py.

spurious.description: Task IDs that appeared in agent reports but were never in the input list — indicates an agent invented a task.
